scripts.proof:deep: EVENTLOOPOS_PROOF_COMMANDS='[{"name":"product event loop postgres restart","cmd":"pnpm","args":["test:e2e:event-loop:postgres"]},{"name":"isolated AeroSpace workspace proof","cmd":"pnpm","args":["live:aerospace:isolated"]}]' bin/proof-agent --manifest artifacts/proof-deep-manifest.json
